name: SmartPhone X1
features: 6.5-inch HD+ display, 5G connectivity, 128GB internal storage, 6GB RAM, 5000mAh battery, 48MP triple camera, fast charging 33W, fingerprint sensor, Android 13
warranty: 1 year manufacturer warranty. Screen damage not covered.
return_policy: 10-day return if unused and in original packaging. No return on opened box.
description: The SmartPhone X1 is an entry-level 5G smartphone perfect for daily use. Excellent battery life and a reliable camera system make it a great value pick under ₹30,000.

name: SmartPhone X2
features: 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 5G, 256GB storage, 8GB RAM, 4800mAh battery, 64MP quad camera, 65W fast charging, in-display fingerprint, Android 14, IP67 water resistant
warranty: 1 year manufacturer warranty with 6-month accidental damage cover.
return_policy: 10-day return if unused and in original packaging.
description: The SmartPhone X2 is a mid-range flagship with a stunning AMOLED display and pro-grade camera. Best in class performance for under ₹40,000.

name: SmartPhone X3 Pro
features: 6.8-inch QHD+ AMOLED 120Hz, 5G, 512GB storage, 12GB RAM, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, 5100mAh battery, 108MP periscope zoom camera, 100W fast charging, IP68
warranty: 2 year comprehensive warranty including screen damage once.
return_policy: 15-day return policy, even if opened, provided device is undamaged.
description: The X3 Pro is TechNova's flagship smartphone. Blazing fast chip, incredible zoom camera, and the longest battery life in the lineup.

name: LaptopPro Z5
features: Intel Core i5 12th Gen, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 512GB NVMe SSD, 15.6-inch FHD IPS display, Intel Iris Xe graphics, Windows 11 Home, backlit keyboard, USB-C Thunderbolt 4
warranty: 2 year onsite warranty. Battery covered for 1 year.
return_policy: 7-day return if unopened. No return once activated.
description: LaptopPro Z5 is a productivity powerhouse ideal for students and professionals. Fast SSD and plenty of RAM ensure smooth multitasking.

name: LaptopPro Z7 Ultra
features: Intel Core i7 13th Gen, 32GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB NVMe SSD, 16-inch 2.5K OLED display, NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB, Windows 11 Pro, RGB backlit keyboard, fingerprint reader, Wi-Fi 6E
warranty: 3 year onsite warranty with dedicated support line.
description: The Z7 Ultra is a creator and gaming laptop with OLED display and dedicated GPU. Handles video editing, 3D rendering, and gaming with ease.

name: SoundPods AirMax
features: Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), 30-hour total battery life, Bluetooth 5.3, IPX5 water resistant, touch controls, dual mic for calls, USB-C charging, 10mm drivers
warranty: 1 year warranty. Physical damage not covered.
description: SoundPods AirMax offer premium ANC at an affordable price. Perfect for commutes, workouts, and long calls.

name: SoundPods ProX
features: Hybrid ANC with transparency mode, 40-hour battery, Bluetooth 5.3 multipoint, Hi-Res Audio certified, 11mm drivers, wireless charging case, find my earbuds, USB-C
warranty: 1 year warranty with 1 free eartip replacement.
description: ProX delivers audiophile-grade sound with powerful ANC. The wireless charging case and multipoint connectivity make it incredibly convenient.

name: SmartWatch FitElite
features: 1.45-inch AMOLED always-on display, GPS, SpO2, heart rate 24/7, sleep tracking, 100+ workout modes, 14-day battery, IP68, NFC payments, Alexa built-in
description: FitElite is a comprehensive fitness and lifestyle smartwatch. With GPS, NFC, and 14-day battery life, it truly does it all.

name: TabletMax 10 Pro
features: 10.9-inch 2K LCD 90Hz, Dimensity 1300 processor, 8GB RAM, 256GB storage, 8000mAh battery, 13MP rear camera, stylus support, keyboard cover compatible, Wi-Fi 6, Android 14
description: TabletMax 10 Pro bridges the gap between tablet and laptop. Great for students, artists, and content creators.

name: RoboVac CleanBot X
features: LiDAR navigation, 4000Pa suction, auto-empty base, 300ml dustbin, mop function, 3-hour runtime, works on carpet and hardwood, app control, Alexa and Google Home compatible
description: CleanBot X uses LiDAR to precisely map your home and clean every corner. The auto-empty base means you only empty the dock once a month.
